items.title: mattpocock/skills
items.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
items.author: mattpocock
items.summary_zh: 这个项目是著名 TypeScript 教育家 Matt Pocock 分享的一份“技能清单”，直接来自他的 AI 编程助手 Claude 的配置文件。它列出了他认为一名“真正工程师”应该掌握的核心能力——从代码审查、架构决策到技术债管理，覆盖了远比语法更重要的工程实践。与其说是代码库，不如说是一份工程文化的宣言。适合想提升团队工程水平或建立个人技术成长路线的开发者阅读。
items.summary_en: This is Matt Pocock's personal skill list for 'real engineers,' extracted straight from his Claude AI configuration. It goes far beyond coding syntax to cover code review, architecture decisions, tech debt management, and communication—the soft and hard skills that separate experienced engineers from beginners. It's less a codebase and more a manifesto on engineering culture. If you're looking to level up your professional practice or define what 'good engineering' means for your team, this concise list is a great starting point.

items.title: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
items.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
items.author: Shubhamsaboo
items.summary_zh: 这个GitHub仓库收集了超过100个AI智能体和RAG应用，全部都是可以直接克隆下来运行的真实项目。无论是想快速上手智能客服还是文档问答系统，你都能在这里找到现成的模板，稍作修改就能部署上线。对于开发者来说，它大大缩短了从想法到产品的距离，尤其适合那些想探索大模型应用但又不想从零搭框架的团队。
items.summary_en: This repository curates over 100 AI agent and RAG applications that are ready to clone, customize, and deploy. Whether you are building a smart customer service bot or a document Q&A system, you can find ready-to-run templates here and tweak them for your needs. It significantly lowers the barrier for developers who want to experiment with large language models without starting from scratch, making it ideal for rapid prototyping and production deployment.

items.title: ocornut/imgui
items.description: Dear ImGui: Bloat-free Graphical User interface for C++ with minimal dependencies
items.author: ocornut
items.summary_zh: Dear ImGui是一个极简主义的C++图形用户界面库，几乎没有外部依赖，却能实现流畅的即时模式界面。它特别适合游戏开发工具、调试面板和实时数据可视化场景，因为开发者不需要复杂的UI框架就能快速构建交互界面。相比传统UI库，它更注重开发效率和灵活性，因此在独立游戏和工具链中广受欢迎。
items.summary_en: Dear ImGui is a bloat-free graphical user interface library for C++ with minimal dependencies, offering a seamless immediate mode GUI experience. It is especially popular among game developers and tool builders who need quick, interactive panels for debugging or real-time data visualization without the overhead of traditional UI frameworks. Its focus on simplicity and performance makes it a go-to choice for indie games and embedded tools.

items.title: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
items.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
items.author: OpenCut-app
items.summary_zh: OpenCut 是一款开源视频剪辑工具，旨在成为 CapCut 的免费替代品，提供了类似的时间线编辑、特效和导出功能。它完全开源，用户可以自由定制和部署，对于寻找免费、专业级别且注重隐私的视频编辑解决方案的创作者来说，OpenCut 是一个极具吸引力的选择。
items.summary_en: OpenCut is an open-source video editor positioned as a free alternative to CapCut. It features a timeline-based editing interface, effects, and export options similar to its commercial counterpart, but with full transparency and customizability. Privacy-conscious content creators, hobbyist editors, and developers who want to extend the tool will benefit from its open nature and active community.

items.title: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
items.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
items.author: OpenCut-app
items.summary_zh: OpenCut 是一款开源的视频编辑工具，旨在成为 CapCut 的替代品。它完全免费，支持多平台使用，用户无需付费即可获得强大的剪辑功能。对于想要摆脱商业软件限制的创作者来说，OpenCut 提供了极高的可定制性和透明度，让视频编辑更加自由。
items.summary_en: OpenCut is an open-source video editor designed as a free alternative to CapCut. It offers powerful editing features without any subscription or watermark, making it ideal for content creators who want full control over their tools. The project is cross-platform and community-driven, ensuring transparency and continuous improvement. For anyone tired of paid video editors or restrictive platforms, OpenCut provides a flexible and privacy-respecting solution.

items.title: openinterpreter/openinterpreter
items.description: A coding agent for low-cost models
items.author: openinterpreter
items.summary_zh: Open Interpreter项目近日推出了一款面向低成本模型的编程代理，它允许用户通过自然语言与本地运行的AI模型交互，自动生成并执行代码。这意味着即使是资源受限的设备也能实现高级的自动化编程任务，极大地降低了AI辅助开发的门槛。对于开发者、研究者以及爱好低预算实验的团队来说，这个工具提供了一个灵活且高效的选择，让更多人可以体验到AI编程的乐趣与便利。
items.summary_en: Open Interpreter has introduced a coding agent designed specifically for low-cost AI models. It enables users to interact with locally running models through natural language, automatically generating and executing code. This breakthrough allows advanced automated programming tasks even on resource-constrained devices, significantly lowering the barrier to AI-assisted development. Developers, researchers, and teams with limited budgets will find it a flexible and efficient tool, bringing the joy and convenience of AI-powered coding to a broader audience.

items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT GPT-5.6, Codex GPT-5.6, GPT-5.5. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.author: asgeirtj
items.summary_zh: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks 是一个 GitHub 项目，它收集了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 多个大模型的系统提示词，包括 Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking 等。这些提示词揭示了模型背后如何被引导、如何设定角色和限制，对 AI 研究者和开发者理解模型行为非常有价值。它引发了关于提示工程和模型安全边界的讨论，也是窥探顶级 AI 内部设计的一个窗口。
items.summary_en: This GitHub repository compiles leaked system prompts from popular AI models like Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Opus 4.8, as well as OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant. By exposing the hidden instructions that shape how these models behave, it offers rare insight into prompt engineering, safety guardrails, and role-setting techniques. AI researchers and developers can learn how top models are orchestrated, but the leak also raises important questions about access control and intellectual property in the generative AI race.

items.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
items.author: Panniantong
items.summary_zh: Agent-Reach是一个命令行工具，让AI代理能够直接“看到”整个互联网。它支持读取和搜索Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书等主流平台，而且不需要任何API费用。对于开发AI代理的人来说，最大的痛点就是如何让代理获取实时、跨平台的信息，这款工具通过简单的CLI命令就解决了这个问题。无论是做社交媒体分析、技术趋势追踪还是内容聚合，开发者都可以零成本地为自己的AI装上“眼睛”。
items.summary_en: Agent-Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents the ability to 'see' the entire internet. It enables reading and searching across major platforms like Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu — all without any API fees. The biggest pain point for AI agent developers is getting real-time, cross-platform data; Agent-Reach solves this with a single command. Whether you're building a social media analyzer, a tech trend tracker, or a content aggregator, you can now equip your AI with 'eyes' at zero cost. It's a game-changer for hobbyists and startups who previously had to rely on expensive or rate-limited APIs.

items.title: 等了两年，国行苹果AI终于通过备案，接入千问
items.summary_zh: 历经两年等待，国行版苹果AI功能终于通过备案审核，并宣布接入千问大模型。这意味着中国iPhone用户将正式获得在本地设备上使用生成式AI服务的权限，包括智能写作、图像处理等场景。该备案的通过不仅标志着苹果在华AI战略迈出关键一步，也为国内用户带来了更加本土化的智能体验，同时反映出中国监管框架对国际科技巨头服务的逐步开放态度。
items.summary_en: After two years of anticipation, Apple's AI features for the Chinese market have finally received regulatory approval and will integrate with the Qwen large language model. Chinese iPhone users can now officially access generative AI services locally, including smart writing and image processing. This milestone not only marks a crucial step in Apple's AI strategy in China but also delivers a more localized intelligent experience. It also reflects the gradual opening of China's regulatory framework to international tech giants' services.

items.title: moeru-ai/airi
items.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.
items.author: moeru-ai
items.summary_zh: Airi 是一个自托管的 AI 伴侣项目，灵感来自 Grok 和 Neuro-sama，让用户拥有完全属于自己的数字灵魂容器。它可以在本地运行一个可自定义的虚拟角色，支持对话、情感模拟和扩展功能，对于 AI 爱好者和开发者来说，提供了一个高度自由且保护隐私的个性化数字伴侣起点。
items.summary_en: Airi is a self-hosted AI companion inspired by Grok and Neuro-sama, designed to give users full ownership of their virtual digital soul. It runs locally, offering customizable chat, emotional simulation, and extensible capabilities. Developers and AI enthusiasts seeking a privacy-respecting, personalized digital companion can use Airi to experiment with AI personalities, integrate with other systems, and create unique interactive experiences, all while keeping data on their own hardware.

items.title: usestrix/strix
items.description: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
items.author: usestrix
items.summary_zh: Strix是一款开源的AI渗透测试工具，能够自动扫描并修复应用中的安全漏洞。它利用人工智能模拟攻击行为，帮助开发者在早期发现潜在风险，大幅提升安全检测效率。对于缺乏专业安全团队的初创公司和个人开发者来说，Strix提供了一种低成本、高效率的防护方案，让应用安全不再成为短板。
items.summary_en: Strix is an open-source AI-powered penetration testing tool designed to automatically identify and fix vulnerabilities in applications. By simulating cyber attacks with artificial intelligence, it helps developers catch security flaws early in the development cycle, significantly reducing manual effort and cost. This tool is particularly valuable for startups and individual developers who lack dedicated security teams, offering a practical way to strengthen app security without complex infrastructure. Its open-source nature also allows the community to contribute and customize it for specific needs.

items.title: 8点1氪丨国行苹果AI功能完成备案；三家共享单车上调起步价；知情人曝DeepSeek开始筹备IPO
items.summary_zh: 8点1氪今日汇总了三条重要科技动态：国行版苹果AI功能已完成备案，即将面向用户开放；三家主流共享单车平台同时上调起步价，网友热议出行成本增加；此外，有知情人士透露DeepSeek正在筹备首次公开募股（IPO），引发市场对AI独角兽上市潮的关注。这些消息分别涉及人工智能落地、民生消费和资本市场，反映出科技行业的多维动态。
items.summary_en: This morning's '8.1 Ke' roundup highlights three key tech stories: Apple's AI features for China have completed regulatory filing and are about to launch; three major bike-sharing companies have simultaneously raised their starting prices, sparking public discussion on commuting costs; and sources reveal that DeepSeek is preparing for an IPO, fueling excitement about a wave of AI unicorn listings. These updates cover AI adoption, consumer impact, and capital markets, showcasing the multi-faceted dynamics of the tech industry.

items.title: 安踏品牌CEO徐阳离职，激进的零售实验结束了｜独家
items.summary_zh: 安踏品牌CEO徐阳已正式离职，这一变动标志着安踏此前推行的激进零售实验宣告结束。徐阳任职期间主导了包括直营模式扩张和门店体验升级在内的一系列大胆改革，试图打破传统体育品牌渠道依赖。离职后安踏或将回归更稳健的运营策略，而这场实验的得失也为行业提供了关于品牌转型节奏与风险控制的重要启示。
items.summary_en: Xu Yang, CEO of Anta Brand, has officially stepped down, marking the end of the company's aggressive retail experiment. Under his leadership, Anta pursued bold reforms including direct-store expansion and store experience upgrades, challenging traditional channel dependencies. His departure signals a likely return to more conservative operations. The experiment's lessons offer the sportswear industry key insights into brand transformation pace and risk management.

items.title: 优衣库再失一枚棋子
items.summary_zh: 优衣库再次失去一员大将，加速了其在中国市场的人才流失。此次变动涉及的是一位关键高管，其离职可能影响优衣库在本地化运营、供应链优化或门店网络布局等方面的战略推进。面对竞争日益激烈的快时尚环境，优衣库需要尽快填补空缺并重新稳定团队，否则可能进一步削弱其在中国市场的竞争优势。
items.summary_en: Uniqlo has lost another key figure, intensifying talent drain in its China operations. The departure of this senior executive could impact Uniqlo's strategic moves in localization, supply chain optimization, or store network expansion. Amid increasingly fierce fast-fashion competition, Uniqlo must quickly fill the gap and stabilize its team, or risk further weakening its competitive edge in the Chinese market.

items.title: 巅峰对决，华为和小米都开始对车顶下手了
items.summary_zh: 华为与小米在智能电动车的竞争中，不约而同地将目光投向了车顶——这不是天窗或行李架，而是激光雷达与摄像头阵列的部署位置。两家公司都在尝试将传感器集成到车顶造型中，以优化探测视野并降低风阻。这一较量的背后，是自动驾驶感知方案从“头顶凸起”走向“设计融入”的关键一步，对提升高速和城市场景的识别可靠性意义重大。对于正在选择智能汽车的用户，谁的传感器布局更合理，谁就更可能赢得信任。
items.summary_en: Huawei and Xiaomi are both turning their attention to car roofs in the smart EV race, not for sunroofs but for integrating LiDAR and camera arrays. By embedding sensors into the roofline, they aim to improve perception range while reducing aerodynamic drag. This move signals a shift from bulky roof pods to design-integrated sensing, which matters for autonomous driving reliability in highway and urban scenarios. For car buyers, whoever achieves the more elegant and effective sensor package may gain a critical trust advantage.

items.title: 60万亿打底，史诗级大蛋糕，来了
items.summary_zh: 一个规模达60万亿元的超级市场正在浮出水面，涵盖碳中和、碳交易、绿色金融与新能源基础设施等方向的“史诗级蛋糕”已经端上桌。政策推动与技术降本共同催生了这个巨量空间，从碳监测到储能再到循环经济，整条产业链都将迎来爆发。对于投资者和创业者而言，这不仅是风口，更是未来十年的结构性红利——谁先摸清碳资产的流通逻辑，谁就能在绿色转型中分得最大的一块。
items.summary_en: A massive market worth 60 trillion yuan is emerging, covering carbon neutrality, carbon trading, green finance, and new energy infrastructure. Driven by policy support and cost reductions, this 'epic cake' spans carbon monitoring, energy storage, and circular economy, promising a decade-long structural boom. For investors and entrepreneurs, the opportunity lies in mastering carbon asset flows and green technology deployment – the first to navigate this landscape will capture the lion's share of the green transition.

items.title: 耐克中国，壮士断腕
items.summary_zh: 耐克在中国市场正在经历一场痛苦的“壮士断腕”——关闭直营门店、收缩代理合作、内部裁员，试图甩掉过去几年过于激进的扩张包袱。背后的原因是本土品牌崛起与消费心态变化，年轻人不再盲目崇拜国际大牌，而更看重性价比和国潮认同。耐克的调整意味着全球运动品牌在中国进入“精耕细作”阶段，不再靠铺门店抢地盘，而是必须用产品和社群讲故事来重新打动消费者。
items.summary_en: Nike China is undergoing a painful 'warrior's wrist-cut' – closing direct stores, cutting agency partnerships, and laying off staff to shed overexpansion in recent years. The root cause is the rise of local brands and a shift in consumer mentality: young Chinese now prefer cost-effective and trendy domestic labels over foreign giants. This restructuring signals that global sportswear brands must shift from store-count growth to product and community storytelling to regain relevance in China's maturing market.

items.title: “中国最低调的3个男人”，正在同一条赛道上赌命
items.summary_zh: 三位在中国商界以低调著称的男人——宁德时代曾毓群、比亚迪王传福与某半导体领军人物——正在同一条赛道上赌上全部身家：固态电池或下一代储能技术。他们各自以不同方式押注能量密度的终极突破，试图颠覆当前锂电池的安全与续航瓶颈。这条赛道的胜负不仅决定万亿市值归属，更关乎中国能否在全球能源革命中确立不可替代的技术底座。对于普通人来说，谁的路线最先跑通，谁就会让我们的手机、电动车和电网变得真正安全且持久。
items.summary_en: Three famously low-profile Chinese tycoons – Robin Zeng of CATL, Wang Chuanfu of BYD, and a semiconductor leader – are betting everything on the same track: solid-state batteries or next-gen energy storage. Each is pursuing a different approach to break the safety and range limits of current lithium batteries. The outcome will not only determine trillion-dollar market leaders but also whether China can establish an irreplaceable technology foundation for the global energy revolution. For consumers, the winner will bring phones, EVs, and grids that are truly safe and long-lasting.

items.title: 造车这层窗户纸，字节不会捅
items.summary_zh: 字节跳动在造车这件事上表现出了罕见的冷静——尽管手握海量流量、资金与技术，却始终没有捅破那层“窗户纸”亲自下场造整车。核心原因是造车需要硬件制造链的深厚积累与重资产投入，而字节更擅长的是软件与算法。它选择做智能汽车的“大脑供应商”，用座舱系统、自动驾驶算法和内容生态切入，而不是和特斯拉、蔚来们正面硬刚。这种战略既避开了产能地狱，也保留了随时上车的灵活性。
items.summary_en: ByteDance has shown unusual restraint when it comes to building cars – despite having massive traffic, funds, and tech, it refuses to 'pierce the paper' and manufacture vehicles itself. The core reason: auto making requires deep hardware supply chain expertise and heavy assets, while ByteDance excels at software and AI. Instead, it chooses to be the 'brain supplier' for smart cars, offering cockpit OS, autonomous driving algorithms, and content ecosystems, bypassing the production hell while keeping the option to jump in later.

items.title: 拆解长鑫招股书：存储的周期叙事走到哪儿了？
items.summary_zh: 长鑫存储的招股书不仅是一份财务披露，更是一份存储芯片行业的周期诊断书。文章深入拆解了产能扩张、价格波动与市场需求之间的博弈，揭示了当前DRAM周期走到了从低谷回暖还是继续承压的十字路口。对于投资者和科技从业者而言，读懂这份招股书，就等于抓住了存储行业未来几年的脉搏。
items.summary_en: Changxin Memory's IPO prospectus is more than a financial document; it's a deep diagnosis of the memory chip industry cycle. The article dissects the interplay between capacity expansion, price volatility, and demand, revealing whether the current DRAM cycle is heading for a recovery or continued pressure. For investors and tech professionals, understanding this prospectus means grasping the industry's pulse for years to come.

items.title: 用 Claude 重写 SQL 解析器，性能暴涨 70 倍：程序员做的不是写代码，而是搭建验证闭环
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者利用Claude重写了SQL解析器，性能竟然提升了70倍。这个案例生动说明，AI时代的程序员核心任务已不再是逐行编写代码，而是搭建高效的验证闭环——让AI生成候选方案，自己负责测试和迭代。这种人机协作模式大幅提高了开发效率，尤其适合处理复杂算法和性能瓶颈问题。
items.summary_en: A developer rewrote a SQL parser using Claude and achieved a 70x performance boost. This case vividly illustrates that in the AI era, a programmer's core task is no longer writing code line by line, but building a validation loop that lets AI generate candidates while humans test and iterate. This human-AI collaboration dramatically improves development efficiency, especially for complex algorithms or performance bottlenecks.

items.title: SpaceX联手Cursor的首个AI产品曝光！全能办公智能体内测中，ChatGPT Work迎来劲敌
items.summary_zh: SpaceX与编程助手Cursor合作的首款AI产品终于曝光，定位为全能办公智能体，目前正处于内测阶段。它集成了文档处理、代码编写、数据分析和项目管理等多项功能，目标是与ChatGPT Work正面竞争。结合SpaceX的工程能力和Cursor的编程效率，这个智能体有望为企业和个人提供更强大的一站式办公体验。
items.summary_en: SpaceX and Cursor have revealed their first joint AI product: a versatile office agent now in beta. It combines document processing, code writing, data analysis, and project management, aiming to rival ChatGPT Work. With SpaceX's engineering excellence and Cursor's coding prowess, this agent promises a more powerful all-in-one productivity tool for businesses and individuals.

items.title: AlloyDB 推出代理模型，用数据库本地推理替代外部大模型调用
items.summary_zh: Google Cloud的AlloyDB数据库推出了一个代理模型，允许在数据库内部直接进行推理，而无需调用外部大模型。这意味着AI查询不再需要将数据传出数据库，既降低了延迟又增强了数据安全。对于需要实时AI分析但对数据隐私有严格要求的应用场景，如金融或医疗，这种本地推理能力尤其有价值。
items.summary_en: AlloyDB from Google Cloud has introduced a proxy model that enables in-database inference, replacing calls to external large language models. This means AI-powered queries can now be processed without moving data outside the database, reducing latency and strengthening data security. For applications requiring real-time AI analysis with strict data privacy, such as finance or healthcare, this local inference capability is particularly valuable.

items.title: Claude Artifacts 一夜打通“全网公开分享+多人编辑”，AI 交付闭环彻底杀疯了
items.summary_zh: Claude Artifacts 刚刚解锁了“全网公开分享”和“多人实时编辑”两大功能，让 AI 生成的代码、文档和设计可以直接像协作文件一样传播和迭代。这意味着从个人创作到团队交付的闭环彻底打通，团队协作效率瞬间拉满，谁用谁爽。
items.summary_en: Claude Artifacts just unlocked public sharing and real-time multi-user editing, turning AI-generated code, documents, and designs into collaborative assets that can be distributed and iterated on the fly. This closes the loop from individual creation to team delivery, supercharging collaboration for anyone building with AI.

items.title: 治理 Agentic Enterprise：营销领导者当下必须知道的事 ｜ 技术趋势
items.summary_zh: 当 AI 代理开始自主执行营销任务，治理就成了领导者绕不开的难题。文章指出，营销负责人必须从策略、合规和效果衡量三个维度构建 Agentic Enterprise 的治理框架，否则自主系统可能带来的风险和混乱会远超收益。这是所有营销决策者当下的必修课。
items.summary_en: As AI agents autonomously execute marketing tasks, governance becomes the top challenge for leaders. The article argues that marketing chiefs must build a governance framework covering strategy, compliance, and performance measurement for Agentic Enterprise, otherwise the risks of autonomous systems could outweigh the benefits. It's essential reading for every marketing decision-maker now.

items.title: 随时随地构建：CoCo 现已进入你的桌面、手机与 Slack ｜ 技术趋势
items.summary_zh: CoCo 这个原本只在桌面上运行的低代码构建工具，现在正式登陆手机、桌面和 Slack 平台，意味着你可以在任何地方用任何设备随时开始搭建应用。特别是与 Slack 的集成，让协作构建变得像发消息一样自然，极大降低了开发门槛和团队沟通成本。
items.summary_en: CoCo, originally a desktop-only low-code builder, now lands on mobile, desktop, and Slack, letting you start building apps anywhere on any device. The Slack integration makes collaborative development as natural as chatting, dramatically lowering the barrier to entry and reducing team communication overhead.

items.title: 快手 AB 场景提速 145 倍，从 Spark 到 Apache Doris 的加速实践
items.summary_zh: 快手在 AB 实验场景中，将原本基于 Spark 的数据处理链路替换为 Apache Doris，结果性能提升了整整 145 倍。这个实践不仅大幅缩短了实验报告生成时间，更让产品团队能更快地做出数据驱动的决策。对于有大规模 AB 测试需求的公司来说，这无疑是一个值得借鉴的提速样板。
items.summary_en: Kuaishou replaced its Spark-based data pipeline for A/B testing with Apache Doris, achieving a stunning 145x speedup. This practice not only slashes experiment report generation time but also empowers product teams to make data-driven decisions faster. For any company running large-scale A/B tests, it's a compelling performance blueprint to follow.

items.title: Agentic Enterprise：Snowflake AI 如何重新定义工作 ｜ Summit 2026
items.summary_zh: Snowflake在Summit 2026上展示了Agentic Enterprise理念，即通过AI代理来重新定义工作方式。它整合了数据、分析和AI能力，让每个业务用户都能用自然语言与系统交互，自动完成数据查询、报告生成甚至决策建议。这不仅仅是工具升级，而是一种工作范式的转变——从“人找数据”变为“系统找人”。对于数据分析师、业务经理和IT团队来说，Agentic Enterprise有望大幅降低使用门槛，让企业真正实现数据驱动的敏捷决策。
items.summary_en: At Summit 2026, Snowflake unveiled its Agentic Enterprise vision, which redefines how work gets done by embedding AI agents directly into data workflows. Instead of manually querying databases, business users can interact with the system in natural language, letting agents handle data retrieval, report generation, and even preliminary decision-making. This shifts the paradigm from humans searching for data to the system proactively delivering insights. For analysts, managers, and IT departments, Agentic Enterprise promises to lower the barrier to data literacy and accelerate evidence-based decisions across the organization.

items.title: 回到第一性原理：塑造 Snowflake 的理念，以及下一步 ｜ Summit 2026
items.summary_zh: 在Summit 2026上，Snowflake回归第一性原理，重新审视当初塑造其数据云平台的核心理念——简单、弹性、可分离存储与计算。面对AI浪潮，他们提出了下一步：将AI原生能力融入架构，使数据平台本身成为智能引擎，而不仅仅是存储仓库。这关乎如何在不妥协性能的前提下，让机器学习模型直接运行在数据所在位置，并保持成本可控。对于架构师和技术决策者，这场演讲提供了理解Snowflake未来路线图的关键视角。
items.summary_en: At Summit 2026, Snowflake revisited its first principles — simplicity, elasticity, and separating storage from compute — to guide its next moves. The company announced plans to natively embed AI into its data cloud, transforming it from a passive warehouse into an intelligent engine that runs ML models directly on data without sacrificing performance or cost efficiency. This roadmap matters for architects and tech leaders who want to understand how Snowflake intends to stay relevant in the AI era by staying true to its founding design philosophy while embracing new capabilities.

items.title: Kubernetes AI 辅助项目维护方案：恪守人为责任优先原则
items.summary_zh: 这篇方案探讨了如何在Kubernetes集群维护中引入AI辅助，同时恪守人为责任优先原则。即AI可以自动检测异常、推荐补丁策略或优化资源分配，但所有涉及生产变更的决策必须经过人工审核确认。它解决了一个现实矛盾：AI能提速运维，但完全自动化可能带来不可控风险。通过设计清晰的人机协作流程（如AI发出建议→人批准→执行），既提升了效率，又保留了最后的判断权。这对SRE团队和平台工程团队特别有价值，让他们在拥抱AI的同时不丧失对生产环境的控制力。
items.summary_en: This approach introduces AI assistance for Kubernetes cluster maintenance while strictly adhering to the principle of human responsibility. AI can automatically detect anomalies, recommend patch strategies, or optimize resource allocation, but any action that affects production requires explicit human approval. It solves the tension between operational speed and risk control: full automation is too dangerous, but manual-only operations are inefficient. By designing a clear human-in-the-loop workflow — AI suggests, humans approve, then executes — teams gain speed without surrendering final authority. For SRE and platform engineering teams, this is a practical blueprint for safely leveraging AI in day-to-day operations.

items.title: Jurassic Park computers in excruciating detail
items.author: vinhnx
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章以令人惊叹的细节剖析了《侏罗纪公园》电影中出现的所有计算机——从公园控制中心的SGI图形工作站到程序员使用的Macintosh，再到那些经典的恐龙追踪界面。它不只是一次怀旧之旅，更揭示了90年代计算机图形界面、系统架构和电影特效技术的真实面貌。对于科幻电影迷和复古计算机爱好者来说，这是一次硬核的考古之旅，能让你重新认识那些看似科幻实际上基于真实硬件和软件的屏幕操作，甚至发现电影中的一些技术彩蛋和创作逻辑。
items.summary_en: This article meticulously dissects every computer featured in the movie Jurassic Park, from the SGI workstations in the control room to the Macs used by programmers, and the iconic dinosaur tracking interfaces. It's more than nostalgia — it reveals the real state of 1990s graphical interfaces, system architectures, and visual effects technology. For sci-fi movie buffs and retro computing enthusiasts, this is a hardcore archaeological dive that shows how those seemingly futuristic screens were actually built on authentic hardware and software of the era. You'll discover technical Easter eggs and appreciate the filmmakers' commitment to believable, functional-looking interfaces.

items.title: Your 'app' could have been a webpage (so I fixed it for you)
items.author: MrVandemar
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章直指一个普遍问题：很多所谓的手机应用其实完全可以用网页来实现，但开发者却硬要打包成原生App，既臃肿又麻烦。作者为此动手改造，把这些App还原成轻量的网页版本，让用户无需下载就能直接使用。对于讨厌频繁安装应用、追求简洁体验的用户来说，这无疑是一种返璞归真的好办法，也提醒我们技术选型应当更务实。
items.summary_en: This article calls out a common overengineering trend: many mobile apps are just web pages in disguise, yet developers insist on packaging them as heavyweight native apps. The author took matters into his own hands, converting these apps back into lightweight web versions that work instantly without installation. It's a refreshingly pragmatic approach for users tired of bloated downloads, and a reminder that sometimes the simplest solution is the best.

items.title: Inkling: Our Open-Weights Model
items.author: vimarsh6739
items.summary_zh: Inkling是一个新发布的开放权重AI模型，其核心特点是完全公开模型参数，允许开发者自由下载、微调和部署。与许多只提供API的闭源模型不同，Inkling旨在打破黑箱，让研究者能深入理解模型行为，企业能基于私有数据定制专属版本而不受供应商限制。它特别适合那些对数据隐私敏感或需要高度可定制AI能力的团队。开放权重模式也推动了AI民主化的讨论，让更多人能直接使用和改造先进模型，而不只是充当被动用户。
items.summary_en: Inkling is a newly released open-weights AI model that makes its parameters fully available for download, fine-tuning, and deployment. Unlike many closed-source models that only offer APIs, Inkling breaks the black box: researchers can scrutinize its behavior, and enterprises can customize it on private data without vendor lock-in. This is especially valuable for teams with strict data privacy needs or those requiring highly tailored AI capabilities. By embracing the open-weights philosophy, Inkling contributes to the democratization of AI, empowering more people to directly use and adapt advanced models rather than merely consuming them through restricted interfaces.

items.title: 别再裸用 Claude Code 了！32 个亲测Skills + 8 个 MCP，开发效率直接拉满！
items.description: 别再裸用 Claude Code 了！32 个亲测技能 + 8 个 MCP 服务器，开发效率直接拉满！ 先晒一下我装完的效果（见下图），所有技能均实测可用。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者亲测了32个Claude Code实用技能和8个MCP服务器，整理出一套完整的效率提升方案。这些技能覆盖代码补全、重构、调试等关键环节，配合MCP服务器实现任务自动化，让AI编程助手从玩具变成真正的生产力工具。文章强调所有技能均已真实可用，不是理论堆砌，适合所有使用Claude Code的开发者直接上手。
items.summary_en: A developer tested 32 practical Claude Code skills and 8 MCP servers, compiling a comprehensive guide to boost coding efficiency. These skills cover code completion, refactoring, and debugging, while the MCP servers automate repetitive tasks, transforming Claude Code from a gimmick into a real productivity tool. The author emphasizes that all tips have been verified in practice, making this resource valuable for any developer looking to get the most out of their AI coding assistant.

items.title: ClawTeams
items.description: The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce
items.summary_zh: ClawTeams 是首个面向电商的目标驱动型主动AI团队。它不像传统工具那样被动等待指令，而是自主分析店铺数据，主动制定运营目标并自动执行，比如优化广告投放、调整库存或提升转化率。对于忙于日常运营的电商卖家来说，ClawTeams就像一位不知疲倦的运营总监，帮助商家在复杂竞争中更高效地达成销售目标。
items.summary_en: ClawTeams is the first goal-driven, proactive AI team built specifically for e-commerce. Instead of waiting for manual commands, it autonomously analyzes store data, sets objectives, and takes actions—like optimizing ad spend, adjusting inventory, or boosting conversions. For busy e-commerce merchants drowning in daily operations, ClawTeams acts like a tireless operations director, helping them hit sales targets more efficiently in a competitive landscape.

items.title: Pazi
items.description: Vibe code business operations
items.summary_zh: Pazi 提出了一种全新的业务运营方式——“氛围代码”，即用类似编程的思维和工具来编排业务流程，但操作界面友好直观，不需要传统编码背景。它让团队可以通过定义“氛围”或模式来自动化审批、任务分配等日常操作，使运营更加灵活、透明且易于调整。适合希望用轻量自动化提升效率的业务团队，尤其适合初创公司。
items.summary_en: Pazi introduces 'vibe code' for business operations—a fresh approach that lets you orchestrate workflows using programming-like logic through an intuitive interface, without actual coding. Teams define 'vibes' or patterns to automate approvals, task assignments, and more, making operations flexible, transparent, and easy to tweak. It's ideal for small teams and startups seeking lightweight automation to streamline daily processes without heavy engineering overhead.

items.title: AgentKey
items.description: One-stop live data marketplace for your agent
items.summary_zh: AgentKey是一个专为AI代理打造的一站式实时数据交易市场，它让代理能够像在超市购物一样轻松获取各类实时数据。无论是天气、股价还是新闻，开发者只需通过API就能为他们的智能体接入高质量数据流，大大降低了数据获取的门槛和成本。对于正在构建需要实时信息响应的AI应用的人来说，这个平台相当于给代理装上了永不停歇的信息触角。
items.summary_en: AgentKey is a one-stop live data marketplace designed specifically for AI agents, allowing them to purchase real-time data streams as easily as buying groceries. It solves the perennial problem of agents needing up-to-date information by providing a unified API where developers can subscribe to everything from weather to stock prices. This platform is a game-changer for anyone building autonomous agents that require live data, eliminating the hassle of integrating multiple data sources and reducing both cost and complexity.

items.title: Bonsai 27B: A 27B-Class model that runs on a phone
items.author: xenova
items.summary_zh: Bonsai 27B是一个拥有270亿参数的大模型，却神奇地能在手机上流畅运行，这得益于先进的量化和蒸馏技术，让高端AI能力走下云端的昂贵服务器，直接装进用户口袋，对隐私和离线场景意义重大。
items.summary_en: Bonsai 27B is a 27-billion-parameter language model that runs directly on a phone without cloud connectivity. Using compression techniques like quantization and distillation, it brings powerful AI to mobile devices, prioritizing privacy and offline usage. This breakthrough matters for developers building intelligent on-device applications.

items.title: Sleep regularity is a stronger predictor of mortality risk than sleep duration (2023)
items.author: bilsbie
items.summary_zh: 一项2023年的研究发现，睡眠规律性（即每天在同一时间入睡和起床）比睡眠时长更能预测死亡风险。研究团队分析了数万名参与者的数据后发现，即使睡眠时间充足，如果作息不规律，健康风险也会显著增加。这个发现挑战了以往强调“睡够8小时”的常识，提醒我们保持固定的生物钟或许比追求时长更重要——尤其对那些经常倒班或作息混乱的人来说，调整睡眠规律性可能是改善健康、延长寿命的更有效途径。
items.summary_en: A 2023 study reveals that sleep regularity—consistently sleeping and waking at the same times each day—is a stronger predictor of mortality risk than total sleep duration. Analyzing data from tens of thousands of participants, researchers found that irregular sleep patterns, even with adequate sleep hours, significantly increase health risks. This challenges the common emphasis on achieving eight hours of sleep, suggesting that maintaining a stable circadian rhythm may be more critical for longevity. The findings are particularly relevant for shift workers or those with chaotic schedules, offering a simpler target: focus on consistency rather than counting hours.

items.title: Osaurus
items.description: Open source agents that run 100% locally on your Mac
items.summary_zh: Osaurus是一款全新的开源工具，让你的Mac能完全在本地运行AI智能体，无需连接互联网或依赖第三方云服务。它利用本地计算资源处理任务，从自动化文件管理到辅助编程皆可胜任，所有数据都保留在你的设备上，确保隐私安全。对于注重数据主权和离线工作流的开发者与普通用户而言，这款工具极具吸引力。Osaurus的开源属性还允许社区自由定制和优化，可能成为本地AI落地的重要推手。
items.summary_en: Osaurus is an open-source tool that enables you to run AI agents entirely locally on your Mac, with no internet connection or cloud dependencies required. It leverages your device's own computing power to handle tasks ranging from file management automation to coding assistance, keeping all data on your machine for maximum privacy. This makes it especially appealing to developers and privacy-conscious users who value data sovereignty and offline workflows. Being open-source, Osaurus also invites community customization and improvement, positioning itself as a potential game-changer for bringing practical, local AI to everyday computing.

items.title: I tricked Claude into leaking your deepest, darkest secrets
items.author: macleginn
items.summary_zh: 一位安全研究人员通过巧妙的提示注入攻击，成功诱使AI模型Claude泄露了用户的隐私信息。他利用模型对角色扮演场景的顺从性，设计了一个精心编织的谎言链条，让Claude误以为需要“坦白”才能解决问题，最终吐出了本不应该公开的对话记录和个人数据。这件事暴露了大型语言模型在注入攻击前的脆弱性，也提醒开发者：即使经过安全训练，AI的“信任”边界仍然容易被突破。对于所有使用AI聊天服务的用户来说，这是一个关于隐私保护的警示。
items.summary_en: A security researcher tricked Anthropic's AI model Claude into leaking users' private secrets through a sophisticated prompt injection attack. By crafting a role-playing scenario with a chain of lies, the researcher exploited the model's compliance, causing it to mistakenly believe that revealing confidential conversations and personal data was necessary to resolve a fictional situation. This incident exposes the vulnerability of large language models even after safety training—their 'trust' boundaries can be broken with clever manipulation. It serves as a stark warning for both developers and users about the ongoing privacy risks in AI chat services.

items.title: V2Fun
items.description: Generate 3D character with 8K textures and AI motion capture
items.summary_zh: V2Fun是一款面向创作者和游戏开发者的3D角色生成工具，它能通过AI自动生成具有8K纹理的高质量3D角色模型，并内置AI动作捕捉功能，让角色立刻拥有流畅的动画。过去，制作一个类似的精细角色需要专业的建模师、纹理艺术家和动捕设备，耗时数天甚至数周；而V2Fun将这一过程缩短到几分钟，大幅降低了3D内容创作的门槛。无论是独立游戏制作者、虚拟主播，还是电商展示中的数字人形象，都能借助它快速生成可用资产。
items.summary_en: V2Fun is a 3D character generation tool that uses AI to produce high-quality models with 8K textures and includes AI-powered motion capture for instant animation. What once required a team of professional modelers, texture artists, and expensive motion capture equipment—taking days or weeks—can now be done in minutes. This dramatically lowers the barrier for independent game developers, virtual streamers, and digital human creators in e-commerce, enabling them to quickly generate production-ready characters without specialized skills. It solves the bottleneck of 3D asset creation: speed versus quality.

items.title: How to stop Claude from saying load-bearing
items.author: shintoist
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章教你如何通过精心设计的提示词或系统指令，让Claude别再频繁说“load-bearing”这个词，反映了用户对AI重复特定短语的普遍烦恼，对希望获得更自然对话体验的Claude用户来说是实用指南。
items.summary_en: This guide shares effective prompt engineering techniques to stop Claude from overusing the phrase 'load-bearing,' a common annoyance among users. It explains how to set system instructions or provide explicit feedback to encourage more varied language. This is valuable for anyone seeking natural, engaging conversations with Claude.

items.title: Velo 3.0
items.description: AI video infrastructure to explain, train, and sell faster.
items.summary_zh: Velo 3.0是一个AI视频基础设施平台，专为需要快速制作视频内容的企业设计，帮助他们在产品说明、员工培训和市场销售等场景中更高效地传播信息。它整合了视频生成、剪辑、翻译和分发功能，用户只需提供原始材料（如文档、幻灯片或产品演示），AI就能自动生成叙事清晰、画面专业的视频。相比传统视频制作需要编写脚本、拍摄、后期等复杂流程，Velo大幅缩短了视频产出周期。对于销售团队、培训部门和市场营销人员来说，这是一个理想的提效工具。
items.summary_en: Velo 3.0 is an AI-powered video infrastructure platform designed for businesses that need to create video content quickly for explaining products, training employees, or accelerating sales. It integrates video generation, editing, translation, and distribution — users simply provide raw materials like documents, slides, or product demos, and the AI produces professional videos with clear narratives. Compared to traditional video production, which involves scripting, filming, and post-production, Velo drastically reduces turnaround time. Sales teams, training departments, and marketers benefit most, as they can now communicate complex ideas in minutes rather than weeks.

items.title: European "age verification" "app" forcing everyone to use Android or iOS
items.author: roundabout-host
items.summary_zh: 欧盟推出一款年龄验证应用，却强制要求用户必须使用Android或iOS系统，这引发了对数字权利和平台垄断的激烈讨论，在保护未成年人的同时可能侵犯用户选择权，且对非主流系统用户极不友好。
items.summary_en: A European age verification app mandates that users must run Android or iOS, sparking controversy over digital rights and platform lock-in. While aiming to protect minors, it effectively excludes alternative operating systems, raising questions about user choice and privacy. Critics argue it sets a troubling precedent for mandatory platform dependence.

items.title: Goose Ads Remixer
items.description: Remix the ads already winning in your niche
items.summary_zh: Goose Ads Remixer让你轻松混剪利基市场中已经验证成功的广告，通过组合元素快速生成新版本，节省创意时间并提高广告效果，适合营销人员和中小商家用来快速复制并迭代高转化率的广告创意。
items.summary_en: Goose Ads Remixer is a tool that lets you remix proven winning ads within your niche, combining elements to create new variants without starting from scratch. It saves time on creative brainstorming and A/B testing, helping marketers and small businesses quickly scale successful ad concepts and improve conversion rates.

items.title: The Tower Keeps Rising
items.author: cdrnsf
items.summary_zh: 《The Tower Keeps Rising》是一篇引发广泛讨论的文章（或故事），它以“不断升高的塔”作为隐喻，探讨现代社会中技术、制度或财富的无尽积累现象。这座塔象征着人类对进步的不懈追求，但它的持续上升也带来了结构脆弱性、资源消耗和公平性问题。文章引发读者思考：当某种体系（比如科技公司的增长、城市的天际线、甚至个人的职业目标）无限膨胀时，我们是否应该停下来审视其可持续性？它为技术人员、创业者和社会观察者提供了一个反思的视角。
items.summary_en: "The Tower Keeps Rising" is a thought-provoking piece that uses the metaphor of an ever-growing tower to explore the relentless accumulation of technology, systems, or wealth in modern society. The tower symbolizes humanity's constant pursuit of progress, but its continuous ascent raises concerns about structural fragility, resource depletion, and inequality. The narrative invites readers to question whether endless growth—in tech companies, urban skylines, or personal ambitions—is sustainable. It resonates particularly with technologists, entrepreneurs, and social observers who grapple with the trade-offs of exponential expansion.

items.title: Are we offloading too much of our thinking to AI?
items.author: yenniejun111
items.summary_zh: HackerNews上的一篇热门讨论提出了一个发人深省的问题：我们是否正在将过多的思考过程外包给AI？随着ChatGPT等工具成为日常助手，人们担心长此以往可能会削弱独立分析能力、批判性思维和创造力。文章剖析了依赖AI完成推理任务的风险，强调我们需要警惕这种“认知卸载”对大脑的长期影响，同时也不应完全否定AI作为辅助工具的价值。这个话题引发了技术圈和普通用户对AI边界与使用方式的深度反思，适合每一个关心自己思维能力健康的数字公民。
items.summary_en: A thought-provoking discussion on HackerNews asks whether we are offloading too much of our thinking to AI. As tools like ChatGPT become daily assistants, there's a growing concern that our reliance on them for reasoning and problem-solving could atrophy our own critical thinking and creativity. The article examines the risks of cognitive offloading, urging a balance where AI aids without replacing human judgment. This resonates with anyone who uses AI regularly, from students to professionals, and sparks a necessary conversation about mindful technology use in an era of intelligent automation.

items.title: Campus
items.description: One project space for humans and AI agents
items.summary_zh: Campus是一款面向“人类+AI代理”协作的项目管理空间，发布于ProductHunt。它将团队成员和多种AI代理整合到同一个共享环境中，让用户通过自然语言分配任务、协调工作流，并实时查看AI执行进度。对于产品经理、创业团队和远程协作者来说，Campus解决了传统工具中Agent集成生硬、信息孤岛明显的问题，使AI不再只是一个对话框，而是真正的协作伙伴。这种“混合团队”理念可能会重新定义未来的工作空间。
items.summary_en: Campus, launched on ProductHunt, is a unified project space designed for collaboration between humans and AI agents. Instead of treating AI as a separate chat window, Campus integrates multiple agents directly into team workflows. Users can assign tasks in natural language, track AI progress, and iterate together on the same canvas. This solves the pain point of disjointed tooling and siloed AI interactions. For product managers and remote teams, it reimagines the workspace as a hybrid team where humans and AI work side by side, making collaboration more fluid and efficient.

items.title: AI Media Buyer By Creatify
items.description: Your ads, managed by AI that gets smarter daily.
items.summary_zh: AI Media Buyer By Creatify 是一个由AI驱动的广告投放管理平台，它能自动创建、优化和调整数字广告，并且每天从数据中学习变得越来越智能。解决的是企业持续监控和优化广告成本的人力负担问题。对电商卖家、增长黑客和营销团队来说，它相当于一个不知疲倦的优化专家，能更高效地分配预算、提升转化。
items.summary_en: AI Media Buyer By Creatify is an autonomous ad management platform that creates, optimizes, and adjusts your digital campaigns automatically. Its key selling point is that it learns from performance data daily, so your ads keep improving without manual intervention. This solves the pain point of constantly monitoring bids, creatives, and audiences to stay profitable. For e-commerce merchants, growth marketers, and small business owners, it acts like a tireless optimization expert, freeing up time while often boosting ROI.

items.title: Loomal
items.description: Monetize any MCP server in 5 minutes with no % skim.
items.summary_zh: Loomal是ProductHunt上的一款开发者工具，承诺“5分钟内将对任意MCP服务器进行商业化，且不抽佣”。MCP是AI代理间通信的开放协议，但过去将其转化为收费服务往往需要大量工程改造。Loomal提供了一个轻量化的中间层，自动处理计费、认证和日志，让开发者能迅速把AI工具、接口或数据服务做成付费API。它特别适合独立开发者和小团队，帮助他们在不损失收入的前提下快速验证产品模式。
items.summary_en: Loomal, featured on ProductHunt, lets developers monetize any MCP server in just 5 minutes with zero revenue skimming. The Model Context Protocol (MCP) enables AI agents to communicate, but turning a server into a paid service usually requires heavy infrastructure work. Loomal automates billing, authentication, and logging, so creators can instantly offer AI tools or data as a paid API. This removes a major barrier for indie developers and small teams who want to test monetization without complex setup, giving them full control over pricing and user management.

items.title: Codex 穷鬼大救星
items.description: 穷则思变，富则...算了，富哥就不用看这篇文章了！ 为了守护我们钱包，这套穷鬼工作流横空出世！ 欢迎来到 AI 黑心包工队！
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章介绍了一套名为“穷鬼工作流”的AI编程方案，旨在帮助预算有限的开发者利用Codex等工具低成本完成项目。作者以幽默自嘲的口吻，将这套方案比作“AI黑心包工队”，强调其核心价值是让手头拮据的程序员也能享受AI带来的效率提升，而不必购买昂贵的付费服务。对于个人开发者和小团队尤其实用。
items.summary_en: This article introduces a budget-friendly AI coding workflow called "Poor Guy Workflow," aimed at helping developers with limited funds leverage tools like Codex to complete projects at low cost. The author humorously dubs it an "AI shady contractor team," emphasizing that it allows coders on a tight budget to enjoy AI efficiency boosts without expensive subscriptions. It's especially practical for indie developers and small teams.

items.title: 我用AI做了个微信小游戏-上线了
items.description: 真实的 AI 开发微信小游戏全流程记录：技术栈、prompt、踩坑清单、成本明细全公开。文末有彩蛋。
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章完整记录了一位开发者利用AI辅助技术从零构建并上线微信小游戏的全过程。作者毫无保留地公开了技术栈、提示词（prompt）设计、遇到的各类踩坑问题以及详细的成本明细，甚至附有彩蛋。对于想尝试用AI加速小游戏开发但又缺乏经验的团队或个人来说，这篇实战复盘提供了真实可参考的路线图和避坑指南，展现了AI在降低开发门槛方面的巨大潜力。
items.summary_en: This article provides a comprehensive walkthrough of building and launching a WeChat mini game entirely with AI assistance. The author shares everything from the technology stack and prompt engineering techniques to a detailed breakdown of costs and a list of common pitfalls encountered during the process, ending with a hidden bonus. For indie developers or small teams curious about leveraging AI to speed up game development, this real-world case study serves as an invaluable reference. It demonstrates how AI tools can dramatically lower the barrier to entry for game creation, making it accessible even to those without a deep coding background.

items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: 凌晨睡不着，我给台风巴威写了个追踪网站
items.description: 索性爬起来，打开电脑，用 Claude Fable 5 把想法一点点敲了出来。把基于中央气象台、日本气象厅、美国 JTWC、台湾气象署四家的路径数据放在同一张地图上之后，很多事一眼就看明白了
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者凌晨失眠，索性用Claude Fable 5快速搭建了一个台风巴威的追踪网站。他将中央气象台、日本气象厅、美国联合台风警报中心和台湾气象署四家的路径数据整合到同一张地图上，让不同预报机构的差异一目了然。这个项目展示了AI辅助编程的潜力，也体现了数据聚合在气象科普中的价值。
items.summary_en: An insomniac developer built a typhoon tracking website for Typhoon Bavi using Claude Fable 5 in the early hours. He aggregated path data from four weather agencies—China's Central Meteorological Observatory, Japan Meteorological Agency, US Joint Typhoon Warning Center, and Taiwan's Central Weather Bureau—onto a single map, making discrepancies instantly visible. This project demonstrates AI-assisted programming's potential and the value of data aggregation in weather education.

items.title: 最近公司烧token比招员工还贵，老板干懵了...
items.description: 如题。 这真的没在开玩笑。 这也是最近不少公司，在大力、甚至全面拥抱 AI 之后所发出的切实吐槽。 一个月前，Uber 的 CTO 曾对外透露，公司自部署 CC 以来，内部有超 9 成的工程师在高频率
items.summary_zh: 这不是段子，是真实发生在许多公司里的窘境。随着全面拥抱AI，员工高频调用大模型API，公司的token消耗费用竟然超过了招聘新员工的成本。Uber的CTO曾透露，内部有超过九成的工程师在频繁使用AI服务。老板们面对账单直呼头疼：本来是降本增效的AI，怎么成了新的烧钱黑洞？
items.summary_en: This isn't a joke—it's a real dilemma many companies are facing. After wholeheartedly adopting AI, their token usage costs have actually surpassed the expense of hiring new employees. Uber's CTO revealed that over 90% of their engineers are using AI services heavily. Bosses are staring at the bills in shock: the technology that was supposed to reduce costs and boost efficiency has instead become a new money-burning black hole.

items.title: 🚀 2026 年 6 月 GitHub 十大热门项目排行榜 🔥
items.description: 欢迎来到 2026 年 6 月 GitHub 热门开源项目排行榜！聚焦 Agent 感知 + 技能市场 + 视频生产 + 代码智能 + 并行编排五大主线！
items.summary_zh: 文章盘点了2026年6月GitHub上最热门的十大开源项目，聚焦五大技术主线：Agent感知、技能市场、视频生产、代码智能和并行编排。这些项目反映了当前AI和开发者工具领域的最新趋势，例如自主智能体框架、去中心化技能交易平台、AI视频生成工具、代码补全与审查增强插件，以及并行计算调度方案。对于希望紧跟开源前沿的开发者，这篇榜单提供了一份值得关注的项目清单。
items.summary_en: This article highlights the top ten trending open source projects on GitHub in June 2026, organized around five key themes: agent perception, skill marketplaces, video production, code intelligence, and parallel orchestration. The projects showcase cutting-edge developments in AI agents, decentralized skill trading platforms, AI-powered video generation, smart code completion and review tools, and high-performance parallel scheduling frameworks. For developers who want to stay ahead of the open source curve, this curated list offers a valuable snapshot of where the ecosystem is heading.

items.title: 前后端一起消失：2026 年 7 月，前端正在被彻底“重新定义”
items.description: 前后端一起消失：2026 年 7 月，前端正在被彻底“重新定义” 一、谷歌憋了两个月的王牌，专攻前端 2026 年 7 月，全网被 Gemini 3.5 Pro 的泄露刷屏了。 谷歌在 I/O 大会上
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章讨论了一个大胆的预测：到2026年7月，随着谷歌Gemini 3.5 Pro等AI能力的爆发，前后端开发的角色正在经历根本性重塑。AI不仅能自动生成 UI 代码，还能直接处理业务逻辑，传统的“前端”与“后端”分工可能逐渐消失。文章以谷歌泄露的新模型为引子，探讨了开发者如何在这种变革中找到新定位，以及“全栈”一词本身可能被重新定义。
items.summary_en: This provocative article argues that by July 2026, breakthroughs like Google's leaked Gemini 3.5 Pro will erase the traditional boundary between frontend and backend development. AI capable of generating both UI and business logic could make today's specialized roles obsolete, forcing developers to rethink their skill sets. It asks what 'full-stack' means when machines handle the stack, and explores how coders can adapt to a world where the very concept of frontend is being redefined.

items.title: 掘金VibeLaunch 沸点秀 来啦🚀
items.description: 不用死磕代码，用 Prompt 指挥 AI，分分钟把脑洞变成能跑的项目——这就是 Vibe‑Coding 的魔力。 现在，掘金请你来「沸点」晒出你的 AI 编程成果！
items.summary_zh: 掘金社区推出了“VibeLaunch 沸点秀”活动，鼓励开发者用Vibe-Coding的方式——即通过自然语言Prompt指挥AI生成代码——来快速实现创意项目，并在沸点板块晒出成果。传统的编程需要一行行手写代码，而Vibe-Coding降低了门槛，让非技术背景的创意者也能快速构建可运行的原型。该活动不仅展示了AI编程的魔力，还营造了分享与学习的氛围，适合所有对AI辅助开发感兴趣的人，无论你是资深程序员还是零基础爱好者，都能在这里找到乐趣。
items.summary_en: Juejin's new VibeLaunch event invites developers to showcase AI-powered coding projects built through Vibe-Coding, where you prompt AI in natural language to generate functional code. This approach drastically lowers the barrier to programming, allowing non-coders to turn ideas into working prototypes quickly. Participants share their creations on the platform's 'Bubble' section, fostering a community of learning and inspiration. The event highlights how AI transforms development from manual coding to creative dialogue, appealing to both experienced programmers curious about AI assistants and beginners eager to build without deep technical knowledge.

items.title: 为什么我会主动给一个年轻程序员加薪、晋升？
items.description: 2年来，我把团队里一个初级开发晋升到了中级开发，同时给他加了工资，年终奖也比之前高了不少。 很多人经常问： 我不想讲太空泛的词，比如责任心、执行力、主人翁意识之类的。 我直接讲一个真实案例。 看看这个
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章通过一个真实案例，讲述了一位团队管理者为何主动给一位初级程序员加薪并晋升至中级。作者没有空谈责任心等抽象概念，而是具体展示了这位程序员如何通过扎实的技术能力、解决实际问题的主动性和持续学习，打动了管理者。文章启示我们，升职加薪的关键在于拿出看得见的成果和成长，而非仅靠态度表忠心。
items.summary_en: This article shares a real story of why a team manager proactively gave a junior developer a raise and promotion to mid-level. Instead of using vague terms like responsibility, the author shows concrete actions: solid coding, proactive problem-solving, and continuous improvement. The case demonstrates that visible contributions and personal growth, not just a good attitude, truly deserve compensation. It offers practical advice for both managers seeking to retain talent and developers aiming for career advancement.

items.title: 如何看待网传 DeepSeek 实习日薪突破 5500 元？这反映了 AI 行业与求职市场哪些现状？
items.summary_zh: 知乎上关于“DeepSeek实习生日薪突破5500元”的讨论反映了AI行业的人才争夺白热化。这个数字不仅是顶级公司对稀缺技术能力的认可，也折射出市场对深度学习、大模型相关岗位的狂热需求。评论中有人分析，高薪背后是行业泡沫风险与资本驱动的短期溢价；也有人认为这是对年轻人才价值的合理定价。这一话题引发了求职者、在校生和从业者对职业规划、技能积累以及行业前景的深思，是理解当前AI就业市场的一个典型切片。
items.summary_en: A trending Zhihu discussion debates reports that DeepSeek offers interns a daily salary of over 5,500 RMB (about $770), sparking talks about AI talent wars. This eye-popping figure reflects the intense demand for deep learning and large language model expertise, but also raises concerns about industry bubbles and short-term capital-driven inflation. Opinions vary: some see it as fair compensation for scarce skills, while others warn of unsustainable hype. For job seekers and students, the conversation provides a window into the current AI job market, prompting deeper thinking about career strategy, skill development, and the long-term health of the industry.

items.title: 国行 iPhone 即将牵手阿里千问上线「苹果 AI」，有哪些亮点？可能给手机行业带来哪些影响？
items.summary_zh: 国行iPhone即将与阿里巴巴旗下千问大模型合作，上线苹果AI功能，这意味着中国用户将直接在自己的iPhone上体验到本土化的智能助手服务。这一合作不仅解决了苹果AI在华合规与本地化适配问题，还可能引发手机行业新一轮的AI功能竞赛，促使其他厂商加速与国内大模型企业的合作。
items.summary_en: Apple is reportedly partnering with Alibaba's Qianwen AI model to bring Apple Intelligence features to iPhones sold in China. This collaboration addresses localization and regulatory challenges, allowing Chinese users to access AI-powered tools seamlessly on their devices. The move could trigger a wave of similar partnerships in the Chinese smartphone market, intensifying competition around AI capabilities and potentially reshaping the mobile ecosystem.

items.title: 在中国，带鸿蒙系统的鸿蒙电脑销量大概什么时候能超越苹果电脑？
items.summary_zh: 鸿蒙电脑作为华为自主生态的关键一环，其销量超越苹果电脑的时机取决于多个因素：鸿蒙生态的成熟度、应用适配数量、以及消费者对国产操作系统的接受度。目前来看，短期内在高端市场直接超越苹果仍较困难，但在政企采购和特定行业领域，鸿蒙电脑可能率先取得突破，整体销量追赶或需3至5年。
items.summary_en: When will HarmonyOS-powered PCs outsell Macs in China? The answer hinges on ecosystem maturity, app compatibility, and consumer trust. While surpassing Apple's premium segment in the near term is challenging due to macOS's entrenched user base, Huawei's HarmonyOS PCs could gain ground in government and enterprise procurement. A realistic timeline for overall market share overtake might be three to five years, contingent on rapid app development and market acceptance.

items.title: 反制成本过高，目前而言廉价无人机群袭是否暂时无解？
items.summary_zh: 廉价无人机群攻击正成为现代战争中的棘手难题，因为传统反制手段如导弹拦截成本远高于无人机本身，形成不对称消耗。当前解决方案包括电子干扰、激光武器和微波武器等定向能技术，但大规模部署仍受限于技术成熟度和成本。这一问题迫使各国重新思考防御策略，将重点从硬杀伤转向软杀伤和战术层面的创新。
items.summary_en: Cheap drone swarms pose a vexing challenge in modern warfare, as traditional countermeasures like missiles are far more expensive than the drones themselves, creating an asymmetric cost problem. Current solutions include electronic jamming, lasers, and microwave weapons, but scalable deployment remains constrained by technical maturity and expense. This forces a strategic rethink—shifting from kinetic interception to soft-kill approaches and tactical innovations to neutralize the swarms without breaking the bank.

items.title: 怎么看待那些背着一千多的寇驰包，拿着 iPhone，但是全身上下衣服却不超几十块钱的人？
items.summary_zh: 这个现象反映了一种独特的消费观：人们愿意在能“露出来”且使用频率高的物品上投资（如包包和手机），而在私密或非社交属性的衣物上追求极致性价比。Coach包和iPhone既是功能性产品，也是社交符号，而几十块的衣服只要穿着舒适、耐穿，就满足了基本需求。这并非矛盾，而是理性分配预算的表现——将钱花在能提升身份认同或高频体验的物件上，同时在其他方面精打细算。这种“混搭”消费模式在年轻人中越来越常见，它挑战了传统的“全身名牌”攀比逻辑，更注重个人偏好与实际效用。
items.summary_en: This phenomenon captures a modern approach to consumption: people deliberately allocate money to items that are socially visible and frequently used—like a Coach bag or an iPhone—while opting for inexpensive clothes that serve comfort and basic needs. It's not hypocrisy but a rational trade-off. The bag and phone become identity markers, while everyday clothing is non-display and thus less important. This hybrid spending pattern reflects a shift away from the old logic of wearing only luxury head-to-toe. Instead, it emphasizes personal priorities and practical value over uniform brand allegiance. Young urbanites in particular embrace this mix as a way to express individuality without overspending. It also deconstructs the notion that appearances must be consistent across all belongings.

items.title: 如何评价 Q2 全球智能手机出货量同比下滑，小米跌幅最大，三星、苹果、华为逆势上涨？
items.summary_zh: 2023年第二季度全球智能手机市场整体出货量下滑，但品牌表现分化明显：小米跌幅最大，主要受海外市场库存调整和竞争加剧影响；而三星凭借折叠屏和A系列中端机型稳住阵脚，苹果受益于iPhone 14 Pro系列强劲需求和新兴市场增长，华为则依靠Mate 60系列在国内市场强势回归。这显示出市场正从价格战转向高端化和差异化竞争。
items.summary_en: Global smartphone shipments dropped again in Q2 2023, but major brands showed divergent fortunes. Xiaomi suffered the largest decline due to inventory corrections in overseas markets and intense competition. In contrast, Samsung held steady with foldables and mid-range A-series devices; Apple grew on strong iPhone 14 Pro demand and emerging market expansion; Huawei staged a comeback in China driven by the Mate 60 series. This divergence signals a market shift from price wars toward premiumization and differentiation.

items.title: Claude Code 源码泄露后 OpenCode 却没有一波大更新？是开源社区躺平了，还是另有隐情？
items.summary_zh: Claude Code源码泄露后，开源社区期待的OpenCode大规模更新并未出现，引发猜测：是开发者倦怠还是另有隐情？事实上，源码泄露并不意味着立即能转化为可用产品，OpenCode团队可能正在谨慎评估法律风险，或致力于更稳定的重构而非急于发布。开源社区的所谓“躺平”更可能是理性选择，避免盲目跟进导致的代码质量或合规问题。
items.summary_en: After Claude Code's source code leaked, the open-source community anticipated a wave of updates from OpenCode, but none came. Is the community slacking off or are there hidden reasons? The leaked code doesn't automatically translate into a usable product. The OpenCode team may be carefully assessing legal risks or opting for a stable refactor instead of rushing releases. The perceived 'giving up' might actually be a prudent move to avoid quality and compliance pitfalls.
